---
title: "AI Session - [DATE]"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
---

## Session Overview

**Agent:** [AGENT_NAME]
**Task:** [TASK_DESCRIPTION]
**Duration:** [START] - [END]

## Context

```{python}
#| echo: false
context = {
    "project": "[PROJECT_NAME]",
    "version": "[VERSION]",
    "problems_count": "[N]"
}
context
```

## Work Done

### [Change 1]

**Files Modified:**
- `path/to/file1.ts`
- `path/to/file2.ts`

**Changes:**
```{typescript}
// Code changes here
```

## Tests Run

```{bash}
npm test
```

## Results

| Test | Status |
|------|--------|
| Build | ✅ Pass |
| Unit Tests | ✅ Pass |
| Type Check | ✅ Pass |

## Next Steps

- [ ] Action 1
- [ ] Action 2

## Session Notes

[Freeform notes]
